questions: Is the underlying cause of the optic neuritis identifiable and treatable? (Yes/No)
Is the patient considering corticosteroid therapy? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing acute optic neuritis? (Yes/No)
Is the brain MRI scan normal? (Yes/No)
Does the visual loss affect both eyes simultaneously or subsequently within hours/days? (Yes/No)
Is only the good eye affected? (Yes/No)
Is the visual loss slow and progressive? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have any allergies? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have G6PD deficiency? (Yes/No)
